PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://192.168.0.18:8443/gantt' -SkipCertificateCheck -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "STATUS=$\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'view-btns'\) { $idx = $r.Content.IndexOf\('view-btns'\); $sliceStart = [Math]::Max\(0, $idx-200\); Write-Output \('---SNIPPET---'\); Write-Output $r.Content.Substring\($sliceStart, [Math]::Min\(500, $r.Content.Length - $sliceStart\)\) } else { Write-Output 'view-btns NOT FOUND' } } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://192.168.0.18:8443/api/project-colors' -SkipCertificateCheck -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("STATUS=" + $r.StatusCode\); Write-Output \("LEN=" + $r.Content.Length\); Write-Output \("PREVIEW=" + $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(400, $r.Content.Length\)\)\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERR=" + $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell([System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = {$true}; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://192.168.0.18:8443/api/project-colors' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output \("STATUS=" + $r.StatusCode\); Write-Output \("LEN=" + $r.Content.Length\); Write-Output \("PREVIEW=" + $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(600, $r.Content.Length\)\)\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERR=" + $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell([System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = {$true}; [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [System.Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://192.168.0.18:8443/api/project-colors' -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output \("STATUS=" + $r.StatusCode\); Write-Output \("LEN=" + $r.Content.Length\); Write-Output \("PREVIEW=" + $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(800, $r.Content.Length\)\)\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERR=" + $_.Exception.Message\); Write-Output \("INNER=" + $_.Exception.InnerException\) })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://192.168.0.18:8443/api/checklists?include_done=1" -SkipCertificateCheck -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; $items = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "Item count: $\($items.Count\)"; if \($items.Count -gt 0\) { $first = $items[0]; Write-Output "First item keys: $\($first.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\)"; Write-Output "Has 'content' key: $\($first.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'content'\)" } } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
